languages.original_text: {n}Trazyn glances around at the crumbling Museion, then shifts his attention to you.{/n} "There is no point in continuing this battle. This part of my archive is past saving. I am just wasting my time on a stubborn pest who is intent on protecting a worthless exhibit."

languages.text: {n}Тразин окидывает взглядом рушащийся вокруг вас Музеон, а затем переводит взгляд на вас.{/n} "Нет смысла продолжать это сражение. Эту часть моего архива уже не спасти. Я лишь трачу время на упрям{mf|ого|ую} вредител{mf|я|ьницу}, защищающ{mf|его|ую} никчемный экспонат".

{n}Trazyn glances around at the crumbling Museion, then shifts his attention to you.{/n} "There is no point in continuing this battle. This part of my archive is past saving. I am just wasting my time on a stubborn pest who is intent on protecting a worthless exhibit."
languages.original_text: {n}Тразин окидывает взглядом рушащийся вокруг вас Музеон, а затем переводит взгляд на вас.{/n} "Нет смысла продолжать это сражение. Эту часть моего архива уже не спасти. Я лишь трачу время на упрям{mf|ого|ую} вредител{mf|я|ьницу}, защищающ{mf|его|ую} никчемный экспонат".

traits.locale_text: {n}Trazyn glances around at the crumbling Museion, then shifts his attention to you.{/n} "There is no point in continuing this battle. This part of my archive is past saving. I am just wasting my time on a stubborn pest who is intent on protecting a worthless exhibit."

{n}Trazyn glances around at the crumbling Museion, then shifts his attention to you.{/n} "There is no point in continuing this battle. This part of my archive is past saving. I am just wasting my time on a stubborn pest who is intent on protecting a worthless exhibit."

{n}Trazyn glances around at the crumbling Museion, then shifts his attention to you.{/n} "There is no point in continuing this battle. This part of my archive is past saving. I am just wasting my time on a stubborn pest who is intent on protecting a worthless exhibit."

languages.text: {n}Trazyn recorre el ruinoso Museion con la mirada, y luego su atención se centra en ti.{/n} «No tiene sentido continuar con esta batalla. Esta parte de mi archivo es insalvable. Estoy perdiendo el tiempo con una alimaña pertinaz que se empeña en proteger una exposición sin valor alguno».
languages.original_text: {n}Trazyn glances around at the crumbling Museion, then shifts his attention to you.{/n} "There is no point in continuing this battle. This part of my archive is past saving. I am just wasting my time on a stubborn pest who is intent on protecting a worthless exhibit."

traits.locale_text: {n}Trazyn recorre el ruinoso Museion con la mirada, y luego su atención se centra en ti.{/n} «No tiene sentido continuar con esta batalla. Esta parte de mi archivo es insalvable. Estoy perdiendo el tiempo con una alimaña pertinaz que se empeña en proteger una exposición sin valor alguno».

languages.text: {n}特拉金环视着摇摇欲坠的陈列馆，随后将目光转向你。{/n}“继续这场战斗毫无意义。我的这部分收藏已经不可挽回。我竟然白费功夫跟一个死脑筋的臭虫较劲，就因为他执意保护一件毫无价值的展品。”
languages.original_text: {n}Trazyn glances around at the crumbling Museion, then shifts his attention to you.{/n} "There is no point in continuing this battle. This part of my archive is past saving. I am just wasting my time on a stubborn pest who is intent on protecting a worthless exhibit."

traits.locale_text: {n}特拉金环视着摇摇欲坠的陈列馆，随后将目光转向你。{/n}“继续这场战斗毫无意义。我的这部分收藏已经不可挽回。我竟然白费功夫跟一个死脑筋的臭虫较劲，就因为他执意保护一件毫无价值的展品。”

languages.text: {n}Trazyn observe le Muséion en ruines, puis tourne son regard vers vous.{/n} « Inutile de poursuivre ce combat. Cette section de mes archives est condamnée. Je ne fais que perdre mon temps avec un nuisible qui s'obstine à protéger une pièce de collection sans valeur. »
languages.original_text: {n}Trazyn glances around at the crumbling Museion, then shifts his attention to you.{/n} "There is no point in continuing this battle. This part of my archive is past saving. I am just wasting my time on a stubborn pest who is intent on protecting a worthless exhibit."

traits.locale_text: {n}Trazyn observe le Muséion en ruines, puis tourne son regard vers vous.{/n} « Inutile de poursuivre ce combat. Cette section de mes archives est condamnée. Je ne fais que perdre mon temps avec un nuisible qui s'obstine à protéger une pièce de collection sans valeur. »

languages.text: {n}Trazyn, yıkılmakta olan Museion'a şöyle bir göz atıp ardından dikkatini sana çeviriyor.{/n} "Bu savaşı sürdürmenin bir anlamı yok. Arşivimin bu kısmı artık kurtarılamaz. Değersiz bir sergiyi korumaya kararlı, inatçı bir baş belasıyla zaman kaybediyorum."
languages.original_text: {n}Trazyn glances around at the crumbling Museion, then shifts his attention to you.{/n} "There is no point in continuing this battle. This part of my archive is past saving. I am just wasting my time on a stubborn pest who is intent on protecting a worthless exhibit."

traits.locale_text: {n}Trazyn, yıkılmakta olan Museion'a şöyle bir göz atıp ardından dikkatini sana çeviriyor.{/n} "Bu savaşı sürdürmenin bir anlamı yok. Arşivimin bu kısmı artık kurtarılamaz. Değersiz bir sergiyi korumaya kararlı, inatçı bir baş belasıyla zaman kaybediyorum."

languages.text: {n}Trazyn lässt seinen Blick über das bröckelnde Museion schweifen, ehe er seine Aufmerksamkeit auf dich richtet.{/n} "Es hat keinen Sinn, diesen Kampf fortzusetzen. Dieser Teil meines Archivs ist nicht mehr zu retten. Ich vergeude nur meine Zeit mit einem störrischen Quälgeist, der entschlossen ist, ein wertloses Exponat zu schützen."
languages.original_text: {n}Trazyn glances around at the crumbling Museion, then shifts his attention to you.{/n} "There is no point in continuing this battle. This part of my archive is past saving. I am just wasting my time on a stubborn pest who is intent on protecting a worthless exhibit."

traits.locale_text: {n}Trazyn lässt seinen Blick über das bröckelnde Museion schweifen, ehe er seine Aufmerksamkeit auf dich richtet.{/n} "Es hat keinen Sinn, diesen Kampf fortzusetzen. Dieser Teil meines Archivs ist nicht mehr zu retten. Ich vergeude nur meine Zeit mit einem störrischen Quälgeist, der entschlossen ist, ein wertloses Exponat zu schützen."

languages.text: {n}トラズンは崩壊しつつあるミュゼイオンを見渡した後、あなたに視線を向ける。{/n}「この戦いを続ける意味はない。このアーカイブのこの部分は救えそうにない。無駄な展示品を守ろうとする頑固な害虫に時間を浪費しているだけだ。」
languages.original_text: {n}Trazyn glances around at the crumbling Museion, then shifts his attention to you.{/n} "There is no point in continuing this battle. This part of my archive is past saving. I am just wasting my time on a stubborn pest who is intent on protecting a worthless exhibit."

traits.locale_text: {n}トラズンは崩壊しつつあるミュゼイオンを見渡した後、あなたに視線を向ける。{/n}「この戦いを続ける意味はない。このアーカイブのこの部分は救えそうにない。無駄な展示品を守ろうとする頑固な害虫に時間を浪費しているだけだ。」
